bug: BUG-018 no loading skeleton — blank dark page while data loads
fixes: client/index.html: inline boot-skeleton script after #root — paints animated skeleton ONLY if #root has no element children (defense-in-depth for any route without server-injected content)
fixed-prior: og-middleware injects styled SSR chrome/content into #root for every route (verified on /, /admin, /submit), so users see real content, not a blank page, before React mounts
fixed-prior: Home.tsx renders in-app <Skeleton> grid while the awesome-list query isLoading
note: boot skeleton never fires in practice because SSR injection covers all routes; it exists as a guard if a future route ships without bodyHtml
method: playwright live re-repro (dev, anon 1440 / mobile 375 / admin authed)
